Video.summary: Two outlaws set upon Maggie Woolf and her father who are taking refuge from a storm.
Video.title: Storm Over Truckee

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.
Video.title: A Sponge Full of Vinegar

Video.summary: John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old gang member comes to town.
Video.title: Preacher with a Past

Video.summary: A town boss makes trouble for a farmer.
Video.title: The Last Shot

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: A woman falls in love with a man she was planning to rob.
Video.title: The Vintage Years

Video.summary: The man Kit Carson saved from death in the desert turns out to be his wife's ex-fiance.
Video.title: Stubborn Mule Hill

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: Stephen Austin travels with his companion Valdez to purchase land in the Mexican territory of Texas.
Video.title: A Book of Spanish Grammar

Video.summary: Wyatt Earp's brother Virgil masquerades as a bandit to gain access to an outlaw hide-out.
Video.title: Trial at Belle's Springs

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.
Video.title: Coffin for a Coward

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: A missionary puts himself on the line to mediate a conflict between settlers and Navajo.
Video.title: The Peacemaker

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A pioneer fends off a trapper's persistent offers to buy the pioneer's Indian wife.
Video.title: From the Earth, a Heritage

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: A petty drunk transporting a new church bell to Volcano, Calif., decides to sell it off instead.
Video.title: A Bell for Volcano

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: A poet forges a relationship with a street waif.
Video.title: Magic Locket

Video.summary: A Navy officer faces down a vigilante mob.
Video.title: The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Image.alt: The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: In a brawling frontier town, Sister Blandina tries to stop a hanging.
Video.title: The Fastest Nun in the West

Image.alt: The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: Joseph Ridges has crafted an organ and is charged with bringing it safely to Salt Lake City.
Video.title: An Organ for Brother Brigham

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: Suspicion over a farm and its female owner creates a rift between two mining partners.
Video.title: The Lady and the Sourdough

Video.summary: Lured by promises of gold, prospectors provide a wounded outlaw with aid and an alibi.
Video.title: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Image.alt: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: A young Chinese man uses his ancient book to help a miner win money at roulette.
Video.title: The Book

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!
